zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Croft I於1427年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾卡芙特時，他的父親Sir William Croft34歲，母親Margaret Walwyn32歲。他和Eleanor Cornewall至少有8個兒子和4個女兒。他於1471年登記服兵役。他去世於1509年7月29日在英國英格蘭賀福爾萊奧明斯特享年82歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾卡芙特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Croft
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places, for example in Lincolnshire, Lancashire, Herefordshire, and North Yorkshire, all named with Old English croft ‘small arable enclosure (normally adjoining a house)’, or a topographic name for someone who lived by a croft, from Middle English croft.
English: possibly in some cases a variant of   Craft   2.
Americanized form of German, Danish, Swedish, or Jewish   Kraft  . Compare   Kroft   and   Craft  .

variants.name: Craft
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English craft ‘skillful, clever, learned’.
English: habitational name from Croft in Leicestershire. See also   Croft  .
Americanized form of German, Danish, Swedish, or Jewish   Kraft  . See also   Croft  .

variants.name: Crate
meanings: English (Hampshire and Surrey): from Middle English crate ‘hurdle, basket’, or occasionally perhaps from crete ‘cradle’, probably applied as a metonymic occupational name for a maker of such articles. Alternatively, sometimes perhaps a variant of Croft 1.

variants.name: Crofts
meanings: English: variant of Croft , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Groft
meanings: English: perhaps an altered form of   Croft  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Croft I was born in 1427, in Croft, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Croft, was 34 and his mother, Margaret Walwyn, was 32. He had at least 8 sons and 4 daughters with Eleanor Cornewall. He registered for military service in 1471. He died on 29 July 1509, in Leominster, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82, and was buried in Croft, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Croft I est né en 1427, à Croft, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Croft, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret Walwyn, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles avec Eleanor Cornewall. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1471. Il est décédé le 29 juillet 1509, à Leominster, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Croft, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui avuto almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie con Eleanor Cornewall. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1471. ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Croft Iが1427年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクロフトで生まれた時，父Sir William Croftは34歳，母Margaret Walwynは32歳であった。彼はEleanor Cornewallとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1471年に兵役登録をした。彼は1509年7月29日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアレオミンスターで82歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクロフトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Croft I(이)가 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 크로프트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Croft(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Walwyn(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Eleanor Cornewall(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1471년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1509년 7월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 리민스터에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 크로프트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Croft I nasceu em 1427, em Croft, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Croft, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Walwyn, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas com Eleanor Cornewall. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1471. Ele faleceu em 29 de julho de 1509, em Leominster, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Croft, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Croft I родился в 1427 г. в местности крофт, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Croft было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Walwyn, 32. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери от Eleanor Cornewall. В 1471 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 29 июля 1509 г. в местности леоминстир, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности крофт, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Croft I nació en 1427, en Croft, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Croft, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret Walwyn, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas con Eleanor Cornewall. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1471. Murió el 29 de julio de 1509, en Leominster, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Croft, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
